why_us.seo_title: Why Choose Swiss Ecogestes | Expertise & Trust
why_us.seo_desc: Discover our values: commercial neutrality, certified expertise, complete administrative management, and data protection.
why_us.label: Our Commitments
why_us.title: Expertise, Neutrality, and Trust.
why_us.intro: Swiss Ecogestes was founded on a simple conviction: energy transition must be transparent, simple, and profitable for everyone.
why_us.cta_title: Ready to work with a trusted partner?
why_us.cta_desc: Let's discuss your needs and see how we can help you achieve your goals.

confiance.title: Trusted Partner
confiance.desc: We work closely with DIREN (Energy Directorate), SIG, and cantonal programs to ensure compliance for every project.

legal.title: Respect related to Legal Framework
legal.desc: Constant legal monitoring to ensure all installations comply with the latest federal and cantonal standards (MoPEC, IDC, etc.).

data.title: Data Protection
data.desc: Your energy data is sensitive. We treat it with the strictest confidentiality, hosted in Switzerland and secured.

neutrality.title: Commercial Neutrality
neutrality.desc: We do not sell equipment. Our recommendations are based solely on YOUR interest and technical performance, without conflict of interest.

quality.title: Quality Process
quality.desc: Every audit and worksite follows a rigorous quality process, from the first visit to the final acceptance of works.

human.title: Human Approach
human.desc: Because energy transition is primarily a human adventure, we prioritize listening, pedagogy, and personalized support.

privacy.seo_desc: Our personal data protection and privacy policy.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
content: Swiss Ecogestes SARL ('we') is committed to protecting your personal data.
This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your data in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) and the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

collection.title: Data Collected
content: We only collect data you voluntarily provide via our contact forms: name, email address, phone number (optional) and message.
We also collect anonymised browsing data (pages visited, visit duration) using privacy-respecting analytics tools.

usage.title: Data Usage
content: Your personal data is used solely to respond to your contact and information requests.
We do not sell, rent or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
Your data may be shared with our technical providers (hosting, email delivery) strictly for service delivery purposes.

retention.title: Data Retention
content: Your data is retained for a maximum of 3 years from your last contact with us.
After this period, your data is securely deleted.

rights.title: Your Rights
content: Under the FADP and GDPR, you have the following rights: access, rectification, deletion, portability and objection to the processing of your data.
To exercise these rights, contact us at: info@swissecogestes.ch

contact.title: Contact
content: For any questions regarding the protection of your data, please contact us by email at info@swissecogestes.ch

cookies.seo_desc: Information about cookie usage on the Swiss Ecogestes website.
cookies.label: Cookie Management
cookies.title: Cookie Policy

what_is.title: What is a cookie?
content: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website.
It allows the site to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

types.title: Types of cookies used
content: Essential cookies: required for the site to function correctly (navigation, security). They cannot be disabled.
Preference cookies: remember your language and display choices.
Analytics cookies: help us understand how visitors use the site, in an anonymised manner.

third_party.title: Third-party cookies
content: Our site may use third-party services (Sanity CMS, analytics tools) that may set their own cookies.
We have no direct control over these cookies — please refer to the privacy policies of those services.

preferences.title: Managing your preferences
content: You can change your cookie preferences at any time via your browser settings (settings > privacy).
Refusing certain cookies may limit some site functionality.
For more information, consult your browser's help guide (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge).
